## Summary

<!-- What does this change do, and why? Link any related issue (e.g. Closes #123). -->

## Type of change

- [ ] Feature (`feat`)
- [ ] Bug fix (`fix`)
- [ ] Refactor / chore
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Security

## Checklist

- [ ] Branch targets `develop` (not `main`)
- [ ] Commits follow Conventional Commits (`type(scope): description`)
- [ ] `ruff check backend/` and `ruff format --check backend/` pass
- [ ] Tests added or updated, and `make test` is green
- [ ] Any schema change ships an Alembic migration with a working `downgrade`
- [ ] README / docs updated if behaviour or structure changed

## Notes for reviewers

<!-- Tradeoffs, follow-ups, screenshots — anything worth calling out. -->
